design_direction: Bold modernist, editorial brutalism, asymmetric grid, strong typography-as-image, exposed grid lines.

scale.h1: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

rules: Use tight letter spacing on large headings.
Meta labels and overlines must use Space Mono, uppercase, wide tracking.
Poems and prose must use Cormorant Garamond for an elegant, literary contrast to the brutalist headers.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Asymmetric bento/editorial grids. Exposed 1px black borders separating sections.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding for text (p-8 to p-12).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict grid alignment, frequent use of left-aligned text within bordered blocks. Never center-align body text.

hero.style: Massive typography for 'NESTOR WALTERS'. Exposed borders. Hero image placed as a stark block inside a grid cell. Accent color used for a subtle graphical element or single word.

selected_work.style: Instead of friendly sticky notes, present the poems as a rigid, archival index. Monospace meta-data for the publication source, paired with elegant serif for the poem excerpt. Housed in a harsh grid.

photo_series.style: High contrast black and white images. Hard borders. Captions in monospace.

veteran_transfer_project.style: Layout resembling classified documents or forms. Use grid blocks for the Stanford / U. Maine / DD-214 text. Buttons should be stark, solid black or accent colored with sharp corners.

newsletter.style: Editorial form block. Hard borders on inputs. No rounded corners.

hero_silhouette.description: Minimalist portrait silhouette of a man by the ocean, high contrast, used for the Hero or Bio section.

the_ascent.description: Minimalist mountain ascent, used for 'The ascent' card.

between_deployments.description: Minimalist ocean waves, used for 'Between deployments' card.

earth_and_memory.description: Abstract earth texture, used for 'Earth & memory' card.

veteran_documents.description: Vintage military documents, used for the Veteran Transfer Project section.

media.style: Images should ideally have a grayscale or high-contrast filter applied via CSS (e.g., grayscale, contrast-125) to fit the bold modernist theme.

interactive_elements.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Hover states should invert colors or slide in the accent color.
interactive_elements.hover_effects: Subtle translation or stark color inversion. No soft shadows.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a static landing page using React, Tailwind CSS, and lucide-react.
Use grid lines extensively. Wrap sections in border-black/10 or border-black grids. This is an editorial brutalist design, so borders are visible and act as structural art.
Import Google Fonts: Chivo (headings), Cormorant Garamond (poems/body), Space Mono (meta/labels).
Ensure image wrappers use grayscale filter to maintain the stark monochrome palette, unless it's the accent.
No purple, teal, or typical SaaS aesthetics. Keep it raw, paper-like, and heavily reliant on typographic tension.
For the Selected Work section, design an archival ledger or rigid grid instead of the old sticky note style.
